[smoke] renders without crashing (decorative — no aria-label)
[smoke] renders with aria-label without crash
[smoke] renders all five size variants without crashing
[smoke] renders all appearance values without crashing
[smoke] custom style prop accepted without crash
[smoke] testID prop accepted and forwarded without crash
[smoke] accessibilityHint prop accepted without crash
[fn] without aria-label accessibilityElementsHidden is true
[fn] without aria-label element is not accessible (accessible is not true)
[fn] without aria-label accessibilityRole is "none"
[fn] without aria-label no image role is queryable via getByRole
[fn] standard queryByTestId returns null for decorative badge (a11y-invisible)
[fn] without aria-label accessibilityLabel is undefined
[fn] aria-label makes badge accessible (accessible=true)
[fn] aria-label sets accessibilityRole to "image"
[fn] aria-label is reflected in accessibilityLabel prop
[fn] getByRole("image") finds the accessible badge
[fn] getByRole("image", { name }) finds badge by its label
[fn] getByLabelText finds the badge via aria-label
[fn] with aria-label accessibilityElementsHidden is not true
[fn] accessibilityHint is forwarded when aria-label is set
[fn] accessibilityHint is forwarded even in decorative mode (no aria-label)
[fn] testID is forwarded to the host View
[fn] "auto" appearance renders correctly with aria-label (inherits slot or primary)
[fn] size="xs" — container width is 4px
[fn] size="xs" — container height equals width (perfect circle)
[fn] size="xs" — borderRadius is a positive number (circle geometry)
[fn] size="s" — container width is 6px
[fn] size="s" — container height equals width (perfect circle)
[fn] size="s" — borderRadius is a positive number (circle geometry)
[fn] size="m" — container width is 8px
[fn] size="m" — container height equals width (perfect circle)
[fn] size="m" — borderRadius is a positive number (circle geometry)
[fn] size="l" — container width is 12px
[fn] size="l" — container height equals width (perfect circle)
[fn] size="l" — borderRadius is a positive number (circle geometry)
[fn] size="xl" — container width is 16px
[fn] size="xl" — container height equals width (perfect circle)
[fn] size="xl" — borderRadius is a positive number (circle geometry)
[fn] size="xs" and size="xl" produce distinct widths (sizes are unique)
[fn] each successive size is strictly larger than the previous
[fn] default size "m" produces 8px width
[fn] custom style prop merges with size styles (extra props applied)
[a11y] with aria-label rendered as accessible image
[a11y] without aria-label element is hidden from a11y tree
[a11y] aria-label maps to accessibilityLabel
[a11y] decorative badge is not findable via standard getByRole
[a11y] accessible badge has no accessibilityElementsHidden flag
[a11y] multiple indicators with different labels are independently queryable
[a11y] accessibilityHint is surfaced to screen readers when set
